user.title: Poollab Account
user.description:
Enter your personal LabCom API token

Each account has a unique token. Get yours from: {token_url}

1. Open the link above
2. Navigate to 'GraphiQL API'
3. Generate a new token
4. Copy and paste the entire token

⚠️ Never share your personal token!

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Poollab
reconfigure.description:
Update your personal LabCom API token.

Get it from: {token_url}

sanitation.title: Sanitation Method

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Poollab API
